name: Lpi Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Nevada SilverFlume SOS (bot-blocked from automated fetch)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Original name 'LPI Inc Which Will Do Bus' = 'LPI Inc which will do business as ...' — typical Nevada SOS DBA-truncation pattern. Address 1701 County Rd #E3, Minden NV 89423 also associated with 'R H Brown' listing (Yelp), but no FMCSA carrier under either LPI Inc or R H Brown at that Nevada address. No SAFER record by name variants 'LPI', 'LPI INC', 'R H BROWN' tied to Nevada. Nevada SOS direct lookup blocked by bot protection (esos.nv.gov). Likely intrastate charter/school operator not federally registered.

name: F G Goldbach Bus Co
registry_source: Delaware Division of Corporations (search interface; no public records returned via automated query)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Multiple SAFER name-variant searches ('GOLDBACH', 'GOLDBACH BUS', 'GOLDBACH BUS CO') returned zero matches. No FMCSA carrier identifiable under Goldbach name in DE. Address 3 Drake Knl, Lewes DE 19958 is a residential location; consistent with a sole-proprietor / very small intrastate school-bus contractor. Delaware school-bus contractor registry is maintained by DE DOE rather than DOS; not publicly indexed. No web footprint (no website, no BBB, no news).

name: Spencers Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Hawaii DCCA Business Registration Division (BREG); third-party aggregators (Manta, D&B, AllBiz)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate — Molokai-only school bus contractor). Spencer's Bus Service Inc operates Molokai school bus routes from Kawela to Kalamaula under HIDOE Special Education Transportation contract. Address 405 Kamehameha V Hwy / Lot 36 Kapaakea, Kaunakakai HI 96748. Phone (808) 553-5746. Annual revenue est. ~$506K, ~12 employees per Manta. Incorporated 2003 in HI. A related entity 'Dean Kalani Spencer dba Dean Spencer Hauling' USDOT 4288471 (160 Mikia Pl, Kaunakakai HI 96748, intrastate, 1 PU/1 driver, ACTIVE, no safety rating) exists but appears to be a separate hauling sole-prop, not the school bus Inc.

name: Pfeiler Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Maryland SDAT (Business Express); third-party directories (Yelp, YellowPages, CMac)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Multiple SAFER name-variant searches ('PFEILER', 'PFEILER BUS', 'PFEILER BUS SERVICE') returned zero matches. Address 907 Lynvue Rd, Linthicum Heights MD 21090. Phone (410) 609-0756. President Ronald Pfeiler. YellowPages explicitly lists business as CLOSED; other directories still show listings. Maryland intrastate school-bus contractors are licensed by MDOT MVA / county boards, not required to hold federal USDOT for purely intrastate non-CDL school routes. SDAT Department-ID lookup not retrieved via automated query.

name: School Bus Svc Of Ma
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). 'School Bus Svc Of Ma' is almost certainly a truncation of 'School Bus Service of Manatee [County]' — companion entry to rank 1163 'School Bus Svc-Manatee County' at 6109 64th Dr E, Palmetto FL. Address 3005 21st Street Ct E, Palmetto FL 34221. Multiple SAFER name-variant searches ('SCHOOL BUS SERVICE OF', 'SCHOOL BUS SERVICE OF MA', 'SCHOOL BUS SVC', 'PALMETTO BUS') returned zero matches. Manatee County uses district transportation plus private contractors; Yellow Tail Bus Charters (USDOT 2461941, 8892 Founders Cir Palmetto FL) operates from same city but is a distinct carrier. Sunbiz direct entity-name search returned 403 on automated fetch.
